rationale: Review summary; no separate code action beyond the line comments.
Merged provider evidence_artifact_refs with the required evidence.bundle artifact ref instead of overwriting them.
Blank required finding summaries now normalize to a deterministic fallback string while optional text fields can remain absent.
Publication metadata is now sourced from one unambiguous payload object: nested request when present, otherwise the flat payload.
Stringly typed publication flags now use bool coercion instead of Python truthiness.
Secret redaction now covers spaced equals and colon assignment formats, including prefixed API key names.
Automated review container comment; actionable suggestions are represented by the individual line comments.
